emails.subject: Why Pittsburgh patients drive 45 minutes to see Dr. Erickson
emails.preview: It's not what they expected to find.
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Most people who find Enliven Functional Medicine have one thing in common: they've already been everywhere else.

They've seen specialists. They've had labs done. They've been told their numbers are 'normal' — and yet [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] keeps getting in the way of living their life.

Dr. Noah Erickson built Enliven on a simple premise: you deserve 90 minutes, not 9. Every new patient visit starts with a deep-dive conversation, advanced laboratory testing, and a personalized treatment plan — not a prescription pad.

Enliven offers:
- Functional medicine (90-min new patient, $329)
- Biomedical autism care (new patient eval, $595)
- Chiropractic, acupuncture, and craniosacral therapy
- Medical weight loss
- Smoking cessation

All cash-pay. All transparent pricing. Serving Wexford PA and Boardman OH.

If you're ready to find out what's actually driving your health challenges — not just mask them — we'd love to be your next step.

[FIRST_NAME], your first visit starts here.

emails.subject: The real reason your labs 'look normal' (and why you still feel awful)
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Here's something most doctors won't tell you: standard lab reference ranges are built around the average sick person, not the optimal healthy one.

When Dr. Erickson reviews [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] with patients, he doesn't just look at whether a number falls within range. He asks: where in the optimal range does it fall? Is there a pattern across multiple markers that conventional medicine looks at in isolation?

Functional medicine uses advanced testing — organic acids, comprehensive metabolic panels, micronutrient analysis, gut microbiome panels — to map how your body's systems are actually communicating with each other.

For patients with complex issues like fatigue, autoimmune conditions, or ASD, this systems-level view often reveals the biological bottleneck that explains why the standard approach hasn't worked.

This is the Enliven difference: we treat the map, not just the symptom.

If you've been searching for a doctor who will actually look deeper, we're here.

emails.subject: What changed after one year of functional medicine (a patient's story)
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

A patient — we'll call her M. — came to Enliven after six years of unexplained fatigue, joint pain, and brain fog. She'd seen four specialists. All told her labs were normal.

After a 90-minute intake with Dr. Erickson and a comprehensive panel, we identified significant gut dysbiosis, low-grade systemic inflammation, and a nutrient deficiency pattern consistent with her symptoms.

Over the following months, M. worked through a personalized nutritional protocol, targeted supplementation, and regular chiropractic care.

At her one-year visit, she described it simply: 'I feel like myself again.'

Results vary for every patient — functional medicine is not a guarantee, and individual outcomes depend on many factors. But M.'s story reflects what happens when someone is finally treated as a whole person, not a collection of symptoms.

If [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] has been following you through doctor's visits without answers, a functional medicine evaluation may be the right next step.

We're accepting new patients now.
